SellingForm.title: SellingForm
SellingForm.description: Represents a sales form for the mattress and bedding shop.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SellingForm entity.

creatorId.description: The UID of the user who created the form.

isDeliveryPaid.description: Indicates if the delivery cost has been paid.

totalPrice.description: Total price of the products and delivery.

paymentStatus.description: Payment status: Unpaid, Partially Paid, Fully Paid.

paymentType.description: Payment type: After delivery, Installments, Pre-order.

BuyingForm.title: BuyingForm
BuyingForm.description: Represents a buying form for purchasing products from suppliers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BuyingForm entity.
Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

name.description: Name or title of the expense.

category.description: Category of the expense: Daily, Salary, Rent, Electricity, Transport, Other.

sellingFormId.description: Reference to SellingForm if the expense is linked to a sale. (Relationship: SellingForm 1:N Expense)

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product in the warehouse or shop.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

category.description: Category of the product: Mattress, Bed, Pillow, Cover.

sizeModel.description: Size or model of the product.

supplierId.description: Reference to Supplier if known. (Relationship: Supplier 1:N Product)

sellingPrice.description: The price at which the product is sold.

StockMovement.title: StockMovement
StockMovement.description: Represents a stock movement record (in or out).

id.description: Unique identifier for the StockMovement entity.

note.description: Optional note about the stock movement.

buyingFormId.description: Reference to BuyingForm if the movement is due to buying. (Relationship: BuyingForm 1:N StockMovement)

sellingFormId.description: Reference to SellingForm if the movement is due to selling. (Relationship: SellingForm 1:N StockMovement)

id.description: Unique identifier for the Supplier entity.
Unique identifier for the Payment entity.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the CRM system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

role.description: User's role: Admin, Data Manager, Salesman.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer in the CRM.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

ProductSellingForm.title: ProductSellingForm
ProductSellingForm.description: Represents the association between products and selling forms, capturing quantity and price.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductSellingForm entity.

sellingFormId.description: Reference to SellingForm. (Relationship: SellingForm N:N Product)

productId.description: Reference to Product. (Relationship: Product N:N SellingForm)

unitPrice.description: Price of a single unit of the product.

lineTotal.description: Total price for the line item (Quantity * Unit Price).

ProductBuyingForm.title: ProductBuyingForm
ProductBuyingForm.description: Represents the association between products and buying forms, capturing quantity and price.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductBuyingForm entity.

buyingFormId.description: Reference to BuyingForm. (Relationship: BuyingForm N:N Product)

productId.description: Reference to Product. (Relationship: Product N:N BuyingForm)

unitPrice.description: Price of a single unit of the product.

landedCost.description: The total landed cost per product after customs.

definition.description: Stores user profiles and roles. Used for authentication and authorization.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the customer.

definition.description: Stores selling forms data. Includes denormalized data for total price, payment status and payment type.

definition.description: Stores payment data related to a specific selling form.

definition.description: Stores product data related to a specific selling form. Includes quantity and prices.

params.name: sellingFormId
params.description: The unique identifier of the selling form.

params.name: productSellingFormId
params.description: The unique identifier of the product selling form.

params.name: buyingFormId
params.description: The unique identifier of the buying form.

definition.description: Stores product data related to a specific buying form. Includes quantity and prices.

params.name: buyingFormId
params.description: The unique identifier of the buying form.

params.name: productBuyingFormId
params.description: The unique identifier of the product buying form.

params.name: expenseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the expense.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier of the product.

params.description: The unique identifier of the stock movement.

params.description: The unique identifier of the supplier.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to facilitate a secure and scalable CRM for the mattress shop, adhering to the principles of Authorization Independence (CRITICAL), Clarity of Intent, DBAC (Database Based Access Control), and QAPs (Rules are not Filters). Authorization Independence is achieved through denormalization. For instance, user roles are stored in the `users` collection and potentially duplicated within collaborative documents or subcollections if needed (though explicit group roles were not specified in this iteration of the requirements). QAPs are supported by segregating data based on access requirements. The `users/{userId}` structure encapsulates private user data. Collaborative entities (if they existed) would use membership maps stored directly within the document, allowing list operations based on membership to be performed securely. The structure below creates dedicated collections to segregate the data based on roles and different access permissions.
